_meta.description: Verified owner win/loss records and career stats. Cross-referenced across all 6 season archives (2020-2025 MDX files), standings-history.json, and owner performance history. Discrepancies flagged with corrections.
_meta.validationMethod: Internal cross-reference of all six season standings + owner performance corpus
_meta.externalValidationPending: Sleeper API live roster check (task-571 subagent) — will confirm 2025 season final rosters

verifiedRecords.crossReferenceNotes: Consistent across: owners.json, standings-history.json, champion-timeline, all 4 written season archives (2020, 2022, 2024, 2025). Joined league from inaugural Sleeper season 2020.
Joined 2021. Consistent across standings-history.json. 2021: 2-12, 2022: 4-10, 2023: 7-7, 2024: 11-3, 2025: 10-4. Career record only covers 5 seasons.
verifiedRecords.discrepancies: None identified. Note: 5-season career (not 6) — joined league 2021.

verifiedRecords.crossReferenceNotes: Consistent across standings-history.json and owner performance history. Regular season winner in 2024 (11-3) but lost championship to MLSchools12.
Consistent across 2025 season archive and standings-history.json. Worst-to-champion arc: 3-11 in 2022, 8-6 in 2025 championship.
Consistent across standings-history.json and owner performance history. 2023 champion as 6th seed.
verifiedRecords.discrepancies: None identified. Note: owners.json listed playoffAppearances as 5 which is consistent with 2020 missing and then 5/5 from 2021-2025.

verifiedRecords.crossReferenceNotes: Consistent. 2025 Moodie Bowl (4-10) confirmed in 2025 season archive and standings-history.json.
verifiedRecords.discrepancies: Corrected: playoffAppearances was 4 (incorrect), season data shows 3 (2021, 2022, 2023). playoffRate updated to 0.500.

verifiedRecords.crossReferenceNotes: Consistent. Back-to-back runner-up finishes 2021-2022 confirmed in both season archives.
Consistent across standings-history.json. Runner-up 2020 confirmed in 2020 season archive.
2020 championship confirmed in 2020 season archive by name AND score (203.10 to 198.34). Post-2021 decline (4 consecutive missed playoffs) corroborated.
Consistent. 2023 and 2025 playoff appearances confirmed in standings-history.json.
Joined 2022. 0/4 playoff appearances confirmed across standings. Improvement trend: 4-10, 2-12, 3-11, 6-8 — 2025 was strongest season.

validationSummary.note: All owner career records are internally consistent across the BMFFFL document corpus. The 3 corrections to bmfffl-league-rules.mdx (FAAB, trade deadline, taxi eligibility) were the only discrepancies found in Phase C validation so far.
validationSummary.externalVerificationStatus: Sleeper API live check pending for 2025 final standings (task-571 subagent ac9dca77ed3b0e066)
